name: Khushi Tayal
description:
Hi, I'm Khushi Tayal, a counselling psychologist with a deep curiosity for people and the stories they carry.
With a Master’s in Counselling Psychology and a soft spot for stories that heal, I blend science with soul to create safe spaces for people to just... be.
My approach blends evidence-based techniques with a humanistic, person-centred lens. Whether it’s facilitating group therapy or guiding one-on-one sessions, I believe in walking with my clients, not ahead of them.
I'm not here to "fix" you, I'm here to walk with you, laugh with you, maybe cry a bit, and remind you that healing isn’t linear, but it is possible.
Let’s make therapy feel human again.

name: CoachMegh
description: 7 years in the fitness industry, transformed myself and 200+ clients through science-backed training and nutrition. A certified coach and natural bodybuilding athlete, I’ve competed on stage and lived the grind. My mission is to help others unlock their best version — strong, disciplined, and unstoppable

name: Therapy and Tales
description: Tools and techniques to help you with building self awareness and and support your well-being

name: SimpliYoga with Ashlesha
description:
I’m Ashlesha and my journey began with a foundation in engineering and an MBA, leading me through five years of corporate experience. However, inspired by the adage "Love what you do, do what you love," I decided to shift gears and deep dive into the world of yoga

Today, I’m dedicated to teaching yoga and managing my online fashion label, 'Parchaaii.' 

Through the ancient practice of Yoga, I strive to cultivate a nurturing and inclusive space where every practitioner feels truly welcomed on their path to holistic wellness. My aim is to guide individuals in exploring and harmonizing their physical, mental, emotional and spiritual dimensions, navigating the complexities of modern life and discovering the profound benefits of this art of living.

name: Therapy with Devyani
description: Hi there! I’m a Counseling Psychologist who’s here to help you untangle relationship knots, manage daily stress, and feel more like yourself again. Whether you're dealing with tough emotions or just need someone to talk to, I’m here to support you—one step at a time.

name: Dieteasybyisha
description: Sustainable diet plan to lose weight and gain health. Heals women health with simple home cooked food.

name: Therapy with Divya
description:
I’m a Counselling Psychologist, dedicated to providing exceptional mental health care to diverse populations. Proficient in conducting assessments and therapy sessions, developing individualized career counseling & session plans, and utilizing evidence-based therapies. 
I am committed to staying current with advancements in the field of psychology. I wish to contribute towards de-stigmatisation of mental health and concerns.

name: Metaboli-K-al
description:
Having a defence family background I have always been active, but was lanky for the most part, took a decision to change my life and then there was no turning back, and now, I help busy working professionals in achieving lasting weight loss through sustainable lifestyle modifications, typically resulting in an 8-10 kg reduction in 90 days..

This program is focused on : Lifestyle Reprogramming. Metabolic Reprogramming.

Built for professionals who want structure, energy, and performance—without quitting real life.

You eat well. You work hard.
You’ve tried plans, workouts, and even coaches…

But your body still doesn’t match the life you lead.

MR360 is not just another program.
It’s a full-body operating system reset—designed to help you function, focus, and feel in control again.

The 3 Phases:

Rebalance – Clean up internal signals, sleep, cravings, digestion

Rewire – Build muscle, consistency, and metabolic strength

Reinforce – Make results last, even on travel days, deadlines, or off weeks

The Pillars
MRP - metabolic reset protocol

Strength Training 3hrs/week

NEAT Optimization - Everyday movement that burns fat & boosts Clarity

Lifestyle Protocols - Reallife structure for sleep, Sunlight and meals

Accountability - Daily Check-ins + Weekly Checkins

Reach out to know more......

name: Anahata by Annie
description:
I don’t believe healing is something that happens in a perfect morning routine or after one breakthrough session. Healing is messy, slow, and often begins the moment we admit : “I feel off, but I don’t know why.”

Hi, I’m Annie, a Reiki master, tarot guide, and holistic wellness & yoga practitioner. I work with people who feel emotionally stuck, energetically drained, or disconnected from themselves. 

Our work together isn’t about “fixing” you. It’s about coming back to the version of you that already knows. The one who just needs a little space, a little stillness, and someone to hold the mirror.

name: Postpartum Rebound with Kirti
description:
💪 Reclaim Your Body & Confidence – Even with a Full-Time Job and a Baby on Your Hip!
Being a mom is tough. Being a working mom? That’s a whole different level. Sleepless nights, work stress, endless to-do lists — and somewhere in between, you’re told to “just exercise” and “eat clean.”

But your body has changed after pregnancy…
Your hormones have shifted…
And you don’t have the luxury of 2 hours in the gym or following some fancy influencer’s diet.

That’s exactly why I created the Postpartum Fat Loss Program — specially designed for busy working moms over 30 who want real, lasting results without sacrificing their career or their sanity.
✅ What Makes This Program Different?
🔸 Hormone- & Metabolism-Friendly Plans: Tailored for postpartum recovery and sustainable fat loss, even with thyroid or PCOD.

🔸 No Gym Required: Home-based workouts designed to fit into a 20–30 min window, even with a toddler around!

🔸 Indian Diets That Heal: No crash diets. No imported powders. Just simple, delicious, real Indian food.

🔸 Mindset + Motivation: Tools to manage cravings, emotional eating, and mental burnout.

🔸 Personal Support & Accountability: Weekly check-ins, habit tracking, and real-time support so you never feel alone.

💬 Who Is This For?
Working moms who want to lose 10–25 kgs postpartum

Women struggling with belly fat, fatigue, and low confidence

Moms dealing with PCOD, thyroid issues, or slow metabolism

Anyone tired of one-size-fits-all diets and gym guilt

🧡 From One Mom to Another…
I’m Coach Kirti, a certified Fat Loss & Mindset Coach, a mom of 2, and a former 89-kg postpartum woman who once cried in the trial room. I’ve helped 1000+ women transform not just their bodies—but their lives.

Now it’s your turn.
It’s not too late.
And you’re not too far gone.

🎯 Ready to Feel Like You Again?
Join my 90-day Postpartum Fat Loss Program and finally get the structure, support, and strategy to become the confident, energetic, empowered woman you were always meant to be.

👉 Tap the button below to apply now.

name: Shreya | ICF- Certified Life Coach
description:
In a world that asks you to rush, I’ll be the space that lets you return

Hi, I’m Shreya Vats — a certified Life Coach (iPEC-USA), Reiki Healer, NLP & EFT Practitioner with over 600+ deep transformation sessions.

I help high-functioning professionals, empaths, and emotionally aware individuals reconnect with their inner voice, release limiting beliefs, and rebuild authentic confidence.

Whether you're navigating burnout, self-doubt, relationship patterns, or a sense of being “stuck,” I hold a safe, non-judgmental space for emotional healing, energy alignment, and inner clarity.

Let’s work together to move you from emotional overwhelm to grounded self-worth — and from burnout to inner calm.

Instagram: @shreyavats.lifecoach
Website: www.shreyavats.com

name: Inner Alchemy by Priyanka
description:
Welcome to Inner Alchemy By Priyanka —
This is not your average self-help space. This is where high-achievers, heart-led professionals, and bold souls come to break cycles, rewrite stories, and reclaim their power.

Inside this Guild, expect:
💥 Trauma-informed insights that hit deep
🧠 Mindset rewiring rooted in NLP & neuroscience
🔁 Pattern-breaking sessions to get unstuck for real
💬 Honest convos (zero fluff, all depth)
💎 A space to transform your life — career, relationships, and money

If you’ve been doing “the work” and still feel stuck in the same loops — you’re in the right place. Let’s alchemize your pain into power, and your patterns into purpose.

description: relatable mental health insights, simple psychology tips, and supportive content that helps them understand themselves and grow emotionally.

name: Online fitness coaching by harshit
description:
Looking for a permanent solution to all your fitness needs? You’ve landed at the right place!
I offer personalized, result-driven fitness training designed to help you achieve your health goals effectively and sustainably. Whether you’re aiming to lose weight, build muscle, improve endurance, or simply lead a healthier lifestyle — this is your one-stop solution for expert guidance, motivation, and transformation.

description: Healthy and balanced diet plan for weight loss, and lifestyle disorders

name: RESET BY SHRUTI SOLANKI
description:
Helping you eat better, live cleaner, and sass your way through wellness ✨
No fads. No filters. Just food that loves you back.

name: Mindcure with Psychologist Dimple
description:
Embark on a Voyage of Self-Discovery: Your Journey to Wholeness Begins Here....
My name is Dimple Jain, and I'm your guide on this transformative journey. With over 3000 Counseling sessions as a Psychologist, I wield a diverse toolkit - an eclectic blend of evidence-based therapies like CBT, ACT, SFBT, and mindfulness practices. Each approach, a unique instrument in our therapeutic symphony, designed to empower you to overcome the challenges that may currently hold you back.
Feeling lost in a maze of anxiety and stress? Does a shroud of depression dim your inner light? Perhaps low self-esteem or the shackles of procrastination hinder your progress? These are the very battles we can conquer together. In this safe and supportive space, we'll delve into the wellspring of your experiences, values, and goals. This collaborative exploration will illuminate your unique path forward, a personal strategy to vanquish anxiety, cultivate resilience, and rediscover a vibrant sense of self-worth.

name: PEACE POINT
description:
Peace Point is an emotional well-being center led by Psychologist Juhi Singh Sheokand with 9+ years of experience. We offer compassionate, goal-focused counseling for children, teens, parents, and individuals.
✨ Safe space | 💬 Online sessions available | 🧠 Mental wellness that empowers.

name: Heal with Bhakti
description:
I am dedicated to guiding you on a transformative journey of healing and personal growth.

As a life coach and healer specializing in inner child work, I offer personalized and group online sessions to help you nurture your relationships and enhance your well-being. Drawing upon a diverse range of powerful modalities including Reiki, EFT, Cord Cutting, Akashic Records, NLP, and Tarot, I provide a holistic approach to address the root causes of challenges and empower you on your path of personal evolution. Together, we'll explore your inner landscape, release limiting patterns, and cultivate profound healing and lasting positive change.

name: Get fit with Gurpreet
description:
I counsel my clients for GPP (General Physical Preparedness) which means they should be able to handle their daily tasks with ease, with more energy levels & loosing weight at the same time.
No crash Diets
No fat Burners 
Just a Holistic Approach towards a healthy lifestyle!

name: Saraswathy Murugan
description: I am a qualified yoga teacher with a B.E. degree and 5 years of professional experience, committed to guiding individuals towards holistic wellbeing. I specialize in diverse yoga practices, including Hatha, Yin, and Pre & Post Natal Yoga, in addition to leading sessions in meditation and pranayama. My skill set extends to alternate healing modalities such as sound healing, Bach flower remedies, crystal healing, Reiki, and Lamafera, enabling me to address the physical, mental, and emotional needs of my students. Dedicated to fostering a supportive and nurturing environment, I offer both online and in-person sessions to help individuals achieve balance, vitality, and overall wellness.

description:
Yog is a way of living.
If you have a PURPOSE for your transformation, let me help you POWER your inner strength, sharpen focus and fuel resilience, during your transformation journey…….
Immersive yog sessions, align BODY, BREATH & BEING
STABILITY & FLEXIBILITY - The Physical Body - through Asanas
VITALITY - The Energy Body - through Pranayama, Mudras
CLARITY - The Mental Body - through Meditation  
BALANCE - The Emotional Body - through Awareness

name: Trauma-informed Life Coach Tanya - Make Your Life Uncomplicated
description:
Make Your Life Uncomplicated by
1. Healing stress and anxiety 
2. Understanding the root cause of your deep rooted neural patterns 
3. Healing your fears that make you play small in life
4. Removing blockages that don't let you grow in life 
5. Learning to take confident decisions in career and relationships
6. Removing self-doubt and increasing self-worth 
7. Amplifying your self-esteem and confidence 
8. Healing money blockages in your life, enabling abundance flow
9. Healing childhood patterns that make you react in tough situations and not feel grounded with your emotions.
10. Healing communication blockages at work and by learning to express yourself confidently, without fear 
11. Healing causes that make keep you stuck in one place and those which don't allow you to take inspired action for your goals 
12. Balancing upper and lower chakras for reaching your best potential at work and in personal relationships; to be able to balance materialistic world with your spiritual growth 
13. Polishing your Emotional Intelligence & Leadership Skills for better performance at work.

name: The Clarity Lab
description:
Welcome to The Clarity Lab!

🌟 Created by a psychology student with 9 years of corporate experience, this Guild is born from firsthand understanding of what it means to navigate pressure, purpose, and personal growth in today's world.

Here, we blend heart, science, and shared experience to create a safe space for people juggling work stress, anxiety, burnout, and life’s harder questions. You’ll find:

🧘‍♂️ Guided mindfulness practices to create calm amid chaos

🔍 Psychology-informed tools for resilience, clarity, and confidence

💬 Real talk about imposter syndrome, identity crises, corporate fatigue, and emotional overwhelm

🤝 Community circles where every emotion is valid and every voice is welcome

🌿 Ongoing support for reflection, healing, and intentional growth

This Guild isn’t just a collection of tips—it’s a personal mission to hold space for those who feel like they’re “functioning” but not truly living. If you’re ready to turn insight into action, and overwhelm into clarity—you’re home.

name: Understanding mental health with Diya
description: Weekly one on one sessions to help you understand yourself better. Then finding a solution custom made for you!

name: United By Movement
description:
I help busy people develop healthy habits.
Get fun interactive workouts.
Get a step by step guide on developing healthy habits that will keep you fit and healthy for life.

name: Bliss of breath
description:
Daily heal your body through your own breaths.
Learn to breathe in a right way.

name: Charish With 🧘‍♀️
description: Hi this is Charishma, Chartered Accountant by profession. Now recently certified myself as a Yoga Therapist and a Coach. I take personalized as well as group classes. My sessions would be for 45 mins comprising of warm ups, asanas, meditation , pranayama and breathing and relaxation techniques. Pls ping me if you would be interested.

name: Beyond the Mat by ShvettaP
description:
Beyond the Mat by ShvettaP - A community for Fitness and Yoga

🧘‍♀️ Shweta Poojari – Yoga Instructor | Hatha & Prenatal/Postnatal Specialist | Meditation Coach
Hi, I’m Shweta Poojari, a certified yoga instructor with 2 years of experience guiding individuals on their journey through Hatha Yoga, meditation, and prenatal/postnatal wellness.

Over the past two years, I’ve led 100+ hours of classes and workshops, working with students across all levels — from complete beginners to expecting mothers — helping them move mindfully, breathe deeply, and reconnect with their bodies.

As a designer by profession, I bring a creative and intuitive approach to every class. My sessions are thoughtfully crafted to be more than just a workout — they’re immersive experiences that blend movement, breath, and intention in ways that keep students engaged and coming back to their mats with excitement.

Whether you’re looking to build strength and flexibility, prepare for motherhood, or simply find a peaceful space to recharge, I’m here to support your journey — one mindful breath at a time.

What I Offer:

🧘‍♂️ Hatha Yoga: For strength, balance, and mindful movement

🤰 Prenatal & Postnatal Yoga: Safe, nurturing practices for moms and moms-to-be

🧘 Meditation & Breathwork: Calm the mind, energize the body

Regular short duration workshops for anyone wanting to polish their skills!

Let’s make your practice something you look forward to — again and again.

“Yoga should feel like a homecoming — not a performance.”
Let’s return to your breath, your body, and your calm.

name: Pragya -Etrecoeur Wellness Centre
description: Empowering you with science-backed nutrition tips, practical meal strategies, and mindset tools to improve energy, gut health, and weight confidence. Expect weekly guidance, live Q&As, and habit-change challenges curated by a clinical nutritionist.

name: Fit&fabwithswapna
description: Certified Nutrition and fitness coach helping busy individuals get healthy and fit.

description: The Holistic Way by Dr. Mansi - A community for Nutrition and Diet

name: Jeenu Arora | Counselling Psychologist
description: Hi, I’m Jeenu Arora — a Counselling Psychologist based in Delhi. I help individuals navigate anxiety, trauma, grief, relationships, and life transitions through a blend of psychodynamic, humanistic, and evidence-based approaches.

name: Krish Das
description:
Fitness is the ability to perform daily tasks with vigor and alertness, without undue fatigue, and with ample energy to enjoy leisure activities and respond to emergencies.

Yoga is basically a spiritual discipline which is based on an extremely subtle science that concentrates on bringing harmony between mind and body

name: Purva Bahadkar:  Nourishing Generations
description:
At Purva Nourishes, I offer personalized 1:1 nutrition counselling, engaging courses, and interactive workshops designed for mothers, toddlers, and caregivers. My approach is holistic and sustainable, grounded in science, rooted in empathy, and free from extreme rules or restrictive diets.

Along with child and maternal nutrition, I also provide lactation counselling — helping new mothers navigate breastfeeding challenges with confidence, comfort, and clarity. From establishing milk supply to overcoming common feeding concerns, I support mothers through evidence-based, compassionate guidance.

Whether you’re a parent navigating the early years, someone managing PCOD, or a preschool aiming to build a healthier community, my goal is to help you make food a source of confidence, not confusion.

Through evidence-based insights and culturally relevant strategies, I aim to make nutrition simple, practical, and joyful—because food is not a luxury, it’s a right. 🌾

name: Anand Shinde
description:
An expert in fitness training and wellness instruction, adept at guiding clients towards their health and fitness goals.
Strong in emotional intelligence and effective communication, ensuring a supportive environment.
Self-motivated and proficient in Ashtanga Vinyasa Flow, with a focus on precision and discipline.
Skilled in time management, making sessions productive and tailored for individual needs.
A passionate life coach with deep experience in assessing and supporting overall client health and well‑being.

name: YogawithTani
description:
Welcome to your space for balance — mind, body & soul.
I help you build a healthy lifestyle through yoga, movement, mindful eating, and mental wellness.
Join me for 1:1 or group sessions, read blogs that truly help, and start your journey to a stronger, calmer, and happier you.

name: Consultant Psychologist
description: "As a psychologist, I provide a safe and supportive environment to explore your thoughts, feelings, and behaviors. Together, we'll work on developing effective coping strategies to manage stress, anxiety, and other challenges. My goal is to empower you with the tools and insights needed to enhance your relationships, build resilience, and achieve personal growth.

name: Yogmalika
description:
Prenatal and Postnatal expert
Empowering Moms & Women
Heal through movement, breath & strength

name: Mohan Ji
description:
Just Be calm and focus on your job and remember 
"You are the best"

name: Shilpii Aggarwal
description:
Mphil clinical psychologist RCI licensed professional.
With 11 years of experience of working in different govt and private hospital both adult and children population. In Psychotherapy (CBT, DBT, ACT and trauma informed therapy are my area of expertise) for disorders like (Anxiety, depression, ocd etc) and parent child counselling and relationship/ marital counseling. Take the step towards your healing and growth.

name: HWH Wellness Circle
description:
This Guild is for anyone navigating stress, burnout, emotional eating, or chronic health challenges, and looking for a more compassionate, evidence-based way to heal.

You’ll find insights from health psychology, therapy, and coaching that help you understand the why behind your habits, and tools that support real, sustainable change.

Whether you’re managing PCOS, anxiety, people-pleasing patterns, or feeling stuck in survival mode, this is a space to unlearn hustle-based health advice and rebuild from a place of safety, clarity, and care.

name: Ashrita ZenYogaShala
description:
Hi, I’m Ashrita — founder of ZenYogaShala.
I guide soulful journeys through yoga, meditation, sound healing, and ancient wellness practices. With over 7 years of experience, my work blends tradition with intuition to help you align, awaken, and thrive — on and off the mat.

name: Elevate with Parthivi
description: Welcome to Elevate with Parthivi — a space where performance meets well-being. As a dual-qualified Sport and Exercise psychologist and a Counselling Psychologist, I support athletes and individuals in building mental strength, managing stress, and overcoming personal and professional challenges. Whether you're aiming to thrive in competition or in life, I'm here to help you elevate from within.

name: Kashish Kataria
description:
Hi, I’m Kashish, a therapist and community builder.
My work is warm, honest, and depth-oriented. I hold space for emotions, patterns, and parts of you that want to be seen, without pressure to perform or fix.
Rooted in Gestalt, parts work, and informed by trauma-aware, relational, and experiential approaches. I offer therapy that’s real, nuanced, and grounded in shared humanity.

name: Life Transformation with Subra
description:
I'm passionate about personal growth and professional success. As a Career & Life Transformation Coach, I help individuals navigate life's challenges and achieve their goals. Whether you're a student, a young professional, or seeking a career change, I'm here to support you on your journey to becoming the best version of yourself.

For over three decades, I've been helping individuals unlock their potential. My experience in manufacturing, service, and consulting enables me to provide comprehensive career coaching and life transformation guidance.

name: Nutritionist_ramagupta
description:
Tired of constant bloating, gas, or acid reflux?
Tried everything — medicines, Ayurveda, home remedies — and still feel stuck?

✨ What if I told you that your lifestyle and diet hold the real key to your gut issues?
As an Integrative Nutrition Health Coach specialising in Gut Health (and a certified nutritionist), I help you find the root cause of your digestive struggles and guide you to fix it naturally, step by step.

✅ No more quick fixes — real, lasting gut healing starts with the right guidance.

name: Ayushika anand
description: I provide thoughtful, personalized therapy to help you untangle difficult emotions, build resilience, and move toward the life you want to live.

name: Yoga with Yashi
description:
Welcome to my Yoga Guild a space rooted in mindful movement, breath, and inner strength. 
I teach pranayama, meditation, and strength training, blending traditional practices with practical approaches to help you feel more grounded, focused, and resilient. 
Whether you’re just starting out or deepening your journey, this is your space to breathe, move, and grow at your own pace.

name: Coach Riya
description:
With over 3 years in the fitness industry, I’ve not only transformed my own life but helped 80+ clients do the same. What started as a personal journey has turned into a passion-driven career where I don’t just train bodies but shape mindsets.
From fat loss to strength building to injury rehab, I’ve experienced the ups and downs myself, and that’s exactly what allows me to connect deeply with every client I work with. 
Fitness isn’t just what I do, it’s who I am and my mission is to help others discover that same power within themselves.

name: Heal with Debankita
description:
Certified Mindset Coach and Healing practioner who helps you identify your strength and help you overcome stress, anxiety, lack of self confidence and build resilience for a positive life with scientifically proven mindset and healing techniques.  
After experiencing grief and trauma myself and overcoming negativity through mindset coaching, it is my life’s most beautiful purpose to help others overcome mental health issues.
Remember - You don’t need fixing because you are not broken..you just need the right mindset.!

name: Yoga with Saloni
description: You will get yog asanas pranayamas and a short meditation included in each session.....I am a 500 hours certified yoga teacher from rishikesh...

name: Being by Bhakti
description: Bi-weekly Expressive Arts based tools that means using art, writing, poetry, music and movement based activities that will help you deal with your difficult emotions or simply provide a space to unwind. Will also be sharing insightful and heartwarming journaling prompts!

name: Nutritionist Amisha Gulati
description:
Welcome to your healing space 🌿
I am Amisha, a qualified nutritionist with a Master's Degree in Nutrition and Dietetics. Over the last 4 years, I have successfully helped women with PCOS naturally reverse their symptoms and lose weight sustainably. I helped transform over 300 clients struggling with obesity, thyroid, and diabetes over the last 4 years. 
✨ This guild is for people ready to take charge of their health, naturally. Here, we dive deep into holistic nutrition, PCOS healing, hormone balance, and sustainable lifestyle shifts. Expect expert tips, healing recipes, and genuine conversations that empower you to feel your best—body, mind, and soul.

name: Yoga With Vivek🧘🏼‍♂️
description:
Yoga With Vivek brings an expertise in your Wellness journey.
  Hello I am Vivek Gohil a Ayush Ministry, Govt. Of India Certified Yoga Therapist is here to help you guide you in your Wellness journey

name: Figured It Out (Kind Of) with Yukti
description:
Not here to give you a blueprint  here to sit with your clutter till it starts to make sense.

This Guild is for anyone figuring things out  work, words, wellness or what next.

If you’re overwhelmed, overthinking or over-explaining I’ll help you simplify, reframe and take that first (or next) real step.

Nothing fancy/Just practical conversations, clarity and honest work.

name: Surrender & Stillness
description: Where stillness meets sound, and healing becomes community. Our guilds unite yoga and sound healing practitioners to create safe, soul-nourishing spaces—within you and around you.

name: Online Fitness coaching by Ashwathi

name: Yoga With Neetu Dalal
description:
About Me
I'm a certified yoga instructor and face yoga expert who transformed myself first, and now I'm here to help you do the same.

Transform From Within & Without
Face Yoga Classes - Discover your natural glow through 30+ targeted exercises, lymphatic drainage massage, strategic taping techniques, and collagen-boosting movements. Learn face massage and acupressure points that reduce tension while rejuvenating your skin.

Traditional Yoga Classes - Build strength, flexibility, and inner peace while naturally managing lifestyle challenges. Master pranayama, proper alignment with props, and relaxation techniques that transform your daily life.

Real Results, Real Fast
My clients see remarkable transformations within their first month. Check out my testimonials and Instagram for the proof – because your glow-up journey deserves to be celebrated.

Ready to unlock your radiance? Your most confident, vibrant self is waiting.

name: Latha.C
description:
Stepping into therapy can feel uncertain — but here, you are met with safety, compassion, and respect.

✨ A Safe Space to Be You
Whether you’re feeling overwhelmed, stuck, anxious, or simply lost — this space is for you to express without judgment.

✨ Gentle, Personalized Guidance
No one-size-fits-all solutions. I tailor each session to your needs — blending psychological insight with holistic healing to help you understand, process, and grow.

✨ Tools to Reconnect with Yourself
You'll explore your inner world, heal past wounds, and slowly build emotional strength, clarity, and confidence — at your own pace.

✨ Healing with Depth & Purpose
We don’t just treat the surface. Together, we’ll explore patterns, beliefs, inner child wounds, and life transitions — all with deep presence and care.

Whether you're seeking clarity, emotional healing, or personal transformation — I’m here to walk beside you.

Our sessions run from Monday to Friday,with dynamic and Intense classes from Monday to Thursday,followed by a calming session on Friday.

You can look forward to feeling rejuvenated,refreshed, and balanced through each class.

name: Shyambhai Online Yoga Classes
description:
Shyambhai Yoga delivers comprehensive, real-time online yoga tailored to diverse needs, from holistic wellness and therapeutic support to advanced practice and teacher training. With expert guidance, flexible scheduling, and a thriving student community, it’s a highly credible and results-driven addition for any wellness platform.

Shyambhai Yoga provides 100% live, instructor-led Zoom classes (no recordings),and hosted across seven daily time slots (5 AM, 6 AM, 7 AM, 8 AM, 10 AM, 5 PM, 7 PM) for maximum flexibility) 

~Key Offerings:
	•	Group sessions (₹999/mo): 50 min classes suitable for general fitness, flexibility, stress relief, improved sleep, migraine relief, digestion & immunity support. 
	•	Personalised small-group (1:8) (₹1850/mo): Customised attention to address health concerns like back pain, diabetes, thyroid, etc.  ￼
	•	One-on-one classes (₹8999/mo): Targeted, therapeutic sessions for specific conditions, led by highly experienced tutors. 

~Specialised Programs:
	•	Prenatal, postnatal & fertility yoga (₹1550/mo): Supports healthy pregnancy, strengthens pelvic muscles, enhances milk production, and has helped clients improve delivery outcomes  ￼.
	•	Kids yoga (₹999/mo): Live interactive sessions for children, boosting height, focus, and flexibility, monitored by two teachers  ￼.
	•	Face yoga, pranayama, spiritual yoga, weight-loss flows, Brahma Mahurat early morning, Shirshasana (headstand) training, and more—each designed for targeted benefits like skin tone, breath control, mindful living, weight management, and advanced asana mastery  ￼.

~Credentials & Community Impact:
	•	Over 12+ seasoned yoga gurus with 15+ years of teaching, and 1250+ five-star Google reviews .
	•	Proven results: 82% report 20–30% improved flexibility in 21 days; 93% learn proper breathing within a week; 76% feel less lethargic; stress reduction, improved focus, pain relief (e.g., backache, migraines, thyroid) commonly noted  ￼.
	•	Personalized attention: real-time instructor feedback, backend observers, and dedicated 1:1 follow-ups ensure correct form .

~Wellness Beyond Asanas:
	•	Daily pranayama, sukshma vyayama, and various kriyas enrich sessions  ￼.
	•	Optional yoga teacher training (200/500/900 hours), and curated retreats in India (Rishikesh, Goa, Bangalore, Govardhan, Mumbai) with chanting, sound therapy, Ayurvedic facials, mud bath, etc.  ￼.
	•	Data privacy commitment: personal info used only for class logistics; no third-party sharing

description:
Saloni is a graduate of the University of Pune and holds an MBA from Symbiosis, Bangalore. A former HR professional turned full-time Yoga Teacher and Nutrition Coach, she brings a deep understanding of workplace stress and wellness.

She is an internationally certified Ashtanga Yoga Teacher (200 HR TTC, Yoga Alliance) and a Certified Wellness Consultant from INFS, Pune.

With over 5 years of practice, Saloni offers a dynamic mix of Vinyasa Flow, Ashtanga Vinyasa, and Power Yoga — tailored for all levels.

She conducts:

Corporate wellness programs (virtual & on-site)
Personal 1:1 sessions
Studio-based group classes
Online Zoom classes
Her corporate sessions are designed to reduce stress, improve posture, boost energy, and support overall employee wellbeing. She also offers guided breathwork, desk yoga, and practical nutrition coaching for professionals.

Saloni combines education, inspiration, and accountability to help individuals and teams build lasting, sustainable health habits — both at work and beyond.

name: The Restfulness Method with Garima Verma
description:
As The Restfulness Therapist, I offer a gentle, soul-centered guidance devoted to creating sacred spaces for rest, reverence, and deep inner restoration. This persona is not merely a title—it is an invocation. I listen with presence, hold space with tenderness, and invites others into a rhythm that is slower, softer, and more aligned with the body's wisdom and the heart’s truths.

I believe rest is not just the absence of doing—it is a return to being.
I offer healing not through urgency, but through slow sacred stillness.

Trained and certified in a range of integrative healing modalities including:

1. Classic Yoga (350H),
2. Transpersonal Regression Therapy,
3. Advanced Inner Child Healing,
4. Systemic & Family Constellations,
5. Inherited Family Trauma Resolution,
6. Business Constellations,
7. Craniosacral Therapy,
8. Advanced Emotional Freedom Technique, and
9. Neuro Linguistic Programming.

description:
🌿 Hi, I'm Anushka!
I'm a Counselling Psychologist working with a trauma-informed lens and the co-founder of  Brain Candy Therapy. With a passion for making mental health support warm, relatable, and accessible, I work with individuals navigating challenges like stress, anxiety, relationships, and self-esteem.
I offer online sessions for your convenience, and also provide in-person therapy sessions at Clearmedi Bahra Hospital, Kharar (Chandigarh) for those who prefer a face-to-face connection.
Your story matters, and you don’t have to go through it alone. 💛
Let’s take it one gentle step at a time.

name: Holistic Essence Therapy - Manpreet Kaur (Counselling Psychologist & Psychotherapist)
description:
Hello, I am Manpreet Kaur, a Psychotherapist. I provide counseling and psychotherapy services. As a holistic and integrative therapist, I strive to create a safe, empathetic, and non-judgmental environment where you can feel heard, supported, and empowered.
My approach to therapy is insight-oriented and non-judgmental, creating a safe and confidential space for you to explore your inner world. Understanding the roots of your struggles is a powerful first step toward lasting change.
I employ an integrative approach, combining various modalities to create a personalized treatment plan tailored to your needs. These include:
- Psychodynamic principles, which primarily guide my practice, mean we will explore how your past experiences and unconscious patterns may be influencing your present thoughts, feelings, and behaviors. By gaining a deeper awareness of these patterns, you can begin to make more conscious and empowering choices.
- Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT) and Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) to help you develop practical skills for managing difficult emotions, challenging unhelpful thought patterns, and improving relationships.
- Mindfulness practices to help you cultivate present-moment awareness, reduce stress, and connect with your inner wisdom.
- Existential and psychospiritual principles to explore questions of meaning, purpose, and personal growth, helping you find a sense of deeper fulfillment.
- Positive psychology to focus on your strengths and resources, helping you build resilience and thrive.

By weaving these different perspectives together, we can create a holistic path to healing and growth that honors all aspects of who you are.

Together, we can work through challenges and discover your inner strength, one step at a time. 

Qualifications: 

- M.A. Psychology
- M.A. Sikh Studies
- CBT - advanced training certification
- Mindfulness - practitioner course
- UGC-NET Psychology qualified
- Trainee therapist for 10 months at Reboot Wellness
- I remain committed to continuous learning through a variety of certificate programs and training sessions that aim to broaden and deepen my understanding.

👋 Hi, I’m the therapist who won’t ask you to “just breathe” and call it a day.

I help people untangle thoughts, manage anxiety, heal from old wounds, and yes—survive overthinking at 2AM.

If your brain feels like a browser with 37 tabs open (and 3 frozen), you’re in the right place.

💬 Reach out if you want support that’s real, kind, and makes space for both your mess and your growth. Therapy doesn’t have to be scary—it just has to start.

name: Well Within
description:
Hi, I’m Himanshi Anand — an RCI licensed psychologist with a background in philosophy. Welcome to Well Within, a space dedicated to exploring mental wellbeing, self-awareness, and personal growth.
Here, I blend clinical expertise with a deep love for philosophy to walk alongside you on a meaningful journey of healing and self-discovery. Because I believe that true wellbeing begins from within, and every step toward understanding yourself brings you closer to lasting peace and fulfillment.
As Oscar Wilde wisely said, “Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.” This is your invitation to embrace your unique path and live authentically — right here, well within.

name: Therapy By Neeri Batra
description:
Hello, I’m Neeri – a psychologist with 4 years of experience dedicated to guiding individuals through life's challenges with compassion and insight.

I specialize in working with children, adolescents, adults, couples, and parents, tailoring my approach to meet each individual's unique needs. I believe that every person has the capacity for growth and healing, and I am here to support you.

My therapeutic approach integrates evidence-based therapies with a compassionate, client-centered perspective, creating a safe and supportive space where you can explore your thoughts and emotions without judgment. Together, we'll work towards building resilience, fostering self-awareness, and achieving your personal goals.

Outside of my professional life, I find joy in drawing and drinking coffee, which help me maintain balance. I believe in the importance of self-care and strive to embody this in both my personal and professional life.

If you're ready to embark on a journey towards greater emotional well-being, I invite you to reach out.

name: The Healing Bean
description:
Welcome to The Healing Bean — a cozy, space where mental health meets warmth, curiosity, and care.

Rooted in the belief that healing doesn’t have to be clinical or cold, The Healing Bean is a reflection of soft spaces, deep conversations, and the little rituals that make us feel seen and safe.

I use an eclectic approach to therapy, drawing from a wide range of psychological frameworks and techniques to tailor the process to you. Think of it as a custom brew — grounded in evidence, but stirred with empathy, no judgement, and authenticity.

Who I Work With:
I hold space for individuals (18-35) navigating:
- Anxiety and overthinking
- Stress and burnout, emotional overwhelm
- Relationship issues and breakups
- Creative blocks, sensitivity, or feeling “too much”
- People who want therapy that feels less clinical, more human

With a deep-rooted passion for natural wellness, she helps women reclaim their energy, balance their hormones, and reverse chronic issues like hypothyroidism, PCOS, PMS, and adrenal fatigue—without relying solely on medication.

Through personalized nutrition, functional wellness strategies, and mind-body support, I empower clients to understand the root causes of their symptoms and achieve lasting transformation. Her approach combines evidence-based nutrition with ancient healing principles, supporting the body’s innate ability to heal.

Whether you're navigating perimenopause, struggling with stubborn fatigue, or seeking to optimize fertility, I offer a compassionate, results-driven path to vibrant health.

name: Gunjan Arya - Psychologist in Delhi
description: Explore the transformative counselling & guidance of Ms. Gunjan Arya, Best Counselling Psychologist in Delhi. Embracing a holistic healing to mental health, she extends her expertise through both in-person sessions at Paschim Vihar, Delhi, India and Online Video consultations. At Psych Therapy by Gunjan Arya in Delhi, she & her team specialize in a diverse concerns, including but not limited to anxiety, stress, depression, grief, trauma, LGBTQIA+ issues, relationships, couple counselling and teen counseling. Drawing upon talk therapy & evidence-based methodologies such as TEAM CBT (Cognitive Behavioral Therapy), the Psychologist in Delhi employs a collaborative & empathetic approach to empower clients in their pursuit of mental well-being.

name: Bettermind with Nikhar
description:
Hi, I am Nikhar. I help people understand their emotions, heal past wounds, and build healthier relationships - with others and themselves. 
I work with adults who often feel overwhelmed, stuck, or unsure of why they react the way they do, especially in relationships. My approach combines talk therapy, somatic tools (body-based work), and practical techniques from CBT ( Cognitive Behavioural Therapy) to support you in your healing journey. 
We might explore things like:

1) Why do certain patterns keep repeating in your life?
2) How childhood experiences impact how you feel today.
3) How to manage anxiety, emotional triggers, and self-doubt. 
4) How to reconnect with parts of yourself you had to hide or ignore. 

Whether you are navigating heartbreak, struggling with self-worth, or dealing with anxiety or something else this is a safe space to feel seen, heard, and supported - without judgment.

name: Heal With Anamika 💜
description:
Welcome to Heal With Anamika 😊
Where Healing Meets Empowerment💜 .

We specialize in helping Highly Sensitive, Highly Critical, and High-Achieving individuals break free from the cycle of self-doubt, overwhelm, and inner criticism.

Our Mission:
To help 1,00,000 sensitive souls heal and reclaim their personal power—because your sensitivity is not a flaw, it’s your superpower💪 

If you’ve spent most of your life feeling like:

“I’m not good enough”

“I’m too much” or “too sensitive”

Constantly stuck in your head, overthinking, judging yourself...

You're are the right place. We want you to know -There is nothing wrong with you. Your emotions, your depth, your sensitivity—they are gifts, not burdens.

Our Promise:

We make healing simple and transformation sustainable.
Through a powerful blend of somatic healing, nervous system regulation, and parts work, we guide you to stop outsourcing your power and start trusting the inner coach within.

Because the root of most suffering is Disempowerment.
And our job is to help you reclaim what's always been yours—your agency, your voice, your truth.

Ready to start? Here’s how to join the RECLAIM YOUR POWER movement:

Join our Empowered Community
WhatsApp Group

Stop waiting & Start Reclaiming your power.
It's time to start living your truth.
